questions.question:
The language \( L =\{a^i \: b \: c^i \mid i \geq 0\} \) over the alphabet \( \{a, b, c\} \) is



Theory of Computation: UGC NET CSE | November 2017 | Part 3 | Question: 24
options: Not a deterministic context free language but a context free language
Recursive and is a deterministic context free language
questions.correct_answer: Recursive and is a deterministic context free language
